title: Aurora Headphone — Indigo
summary: Aurora headphone in indigo; built in Mexico for daily use.

content.text:
# Aurora Headphone — Indigo

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Aurora Headphone — Indigo is designed for the long haul, with audio-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Mexico.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
